query: Quick heads up while I am sorting wet towels by the washer get dehumidifier 1 in the utility room powered on with fan 50% 5 minutes from now and 12 minutes after the previous action set it to power on and fan 30% because I want the laundry area less humid. Also since I will be carrying a bunch of chilled meal prep over to the counter cool refrigerator 1 in the kitchen to temp 5.0°C 16 minutes from now and 7 minutes after the previous action set it to temp 1.0°C so the food is properly chilled before I move it.

action_input.answer: I've scheduled all your requests. At 17:27:37, the dehumidifier in the utility room will turn on with fan at 50%. At 17:39:37, it will set to on with fan at 30%.
